title: Controlled Cinematic Overview
summary: A source-grounded documentary overview prepared for review before generation.

scenes.title: Opening context
scenes.narration: Introduce the central source-supported question and why it matters.
scenes.visual_prompt: A fictional adult presenter introduces the topic in a modern Japanese office with subtle environmental movement.
scenes.composition: eye-level medium close-up, unobstructed full face, both eyes visible
scenes.camera: slow dolly-in while maintaining a front or natural three-quarter facial angle
scenes.lens: 50mm natural perspective, face in sharp focus
scenes.ambiance: soft frontal daylight with balanced fill and natural skin tones
scenes.negative_prompt: rear-only view, silhouette, hidden face, distorted face, text covering face

scenes.title: Evidence and explanation
scenes.narration: Explain the strongest evidence and connect it to the source chronology.
scenes.visual_prompt: Two fictional adult colleagues discuss source documents at a meeting table, with both faces revealed through cross-coverage.
scenes.composition: eye-level two-shot followed by face-visible reverse angles
scenes.camera: gentle lateral track with stable facial framing
scenes.lens: 50mm lens, natural proportions, readable documents without obscuring faces
scenes.ambiance: neutral office lighting with soft key and fill
scenes.negative_prompt: back-of-head primary view, face obscured by document, silhouette, static tableau
